mapper.sql: SELECT r.record_id, r.plan_id, r.contract_id, r.customer_id, r.this_amount, r.payment_method, r.bank_account, r.receipt_attachment, r.payment_date, r.confirm_status, r.confirm_by, r.confirm_time, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, c.customer_name, ct.contract_no, p.plan_amount, p.period_no FROM mk_payment_record r LEFT JOIN mk_customer c ON r.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN mk_contract ct ON r.contract_id = ct.contract_id LEFT JOIN mk_payment_plan p ON r.plan_id = p.plan_id
mapper.select: WHERE r.plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY r.payment_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_payment_record (plan_id, contract_id, customer_id, this_amount, payment_method, bank_account, receipt_attachment, payment_date, confirm_status, confirm_by, confirm_time, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{planId}, #{contractId}, #{customerId}, #{thisAmount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{bankAccount}, #{receiptAttachment}, #{paymentDate}, #{confirmStatus}, #{confirmBy}, #{confirmTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mk_payment_record WHERE record_id IN #{recordId}
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(this_amount), 0) FROM mk_payment_record WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND confirm_status = '1'
